$comment_1: Project-level MCP servers. Claude Code reads this file on session start. Empty by default — the starter ships no MCP servers.
$comment_2: To add an MCP server (e.g. Banani for design import, Supabase, Linear, etc.): paste the exact server block your provider gives you inside `mcpServers`. The `/setup-kit` skill walks through this for Banani in Phase 5 (optional). Format examples — stdio: `"name": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "<pkg>"] }` — HTTP/SSE: `"name": { "url": "https://..." }`. Restart Claude Code after editing.
